title: portulaca pilosa subsp. pilosa
intro: Portulaca pilosa subsp. pilosa, also known as dwarf purslane or Asian purslane, is a flowering plant species in the purslane family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and wound healing. In traditional medicine, Portulaca pilosa subsp. pilosa is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its potential medicinal properties.
